Rest.name: Rest
Rest.description: Heal some HP, then fall asleep.

Rest2.description: Heal a lot of HP, then fall asleep.

Brace.name: Brace
Brace.description: Gain +1 temporary Brace until your next turn.

Brace2.name: Brace
Brace2.description: Gain +1 temporary Brace and +1 temporary Thorns until your next turn.

Groom.name: Groom
Groom.description: Remove all of the debuffs on yourself or an adjacent unit.

Groom2.description: Remove all of the debuffs and heal a little HP to yourself or an adjacent unit.

Roll.name: Roll
Roll.description: Roll up to three tiles in a straight line.

Roll2.description: Roll up to ten tiles in a straight line.

SharpenClaws2.description:
Gain +1 [img:str].
Bonus Passive: Your basic attack inflicts Bleed.

Reach.name: Reach
Reach.description: Your next basic attack has +1 range.

Reach2.description: Your next basic attack has +3 range.

ManaDrain.name: Borrow Mana
ManaDrain.description:
Steal up to 5 mana from an ally.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

ManaDrain2.description:
Steal all of an ally's mana.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

SoothingGlow2.description: Heal yourself 1 and gain +1 to a random stat.

Ponder2.description: Gain +1 [img:int] and conjure a random bonus ability.

Focus2.description:
Gain +1 [img:dex].
Bonus Passive: +25% critical hit chance.

Brainstorm.name: Brainstorm
Brainstorm.description: Reduce the costs of your other spells by 1 mana.

Brainstorm2.name: Brainstorm
Brainstorm2.description: Reduce the cost of ALL of your spells by 1 mana.

Momentum.name: Momentum
Momentum.desc_key: This turn, every time you move a tile, increase crit chance by 5% until the end of the turn
Momentum.description: This turn, every time you move a tile, increase crit chance by 5% until the end of the turn

TapLand.name: Tap Land
TapLand.desc_key: At the end of your turn, gain 1 mana for each tile you moved this turn after casting this ability.
TapLand.description: At the end of your turn, gain 1 mana for each tile you moved this turn after casting this ability.

HolyStep.name: Holy Step
HolyStep.desc_key: At the end of your turn, heal neighbors for 1 health for each tile you moved after casting this ability.
HolyStep.description: At the end of your turn, heal neighbors for 1 health for each tile you moved after casting this ability.

LoveTap.name: Love Tap
LoveTap.desc_key: Your next attack or spell heals instead of doing damage
LoveTap.description: Your next attack or spell heals instead of doing damage

BoostSpellRange.name: Boost
BoostSpellRange.description: Gain +1 Magic Damage until end of turn.

BoostSpellRange2.description:
Gain +1 Magic Damage until end of turn.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

Gamble.name: Gamble
Gamble.description: Gain +2% critical hit chance. If your next attack is critical, deal +100% more damage and spawn coins.

Gamble2.description: Gain +2% critical hit chance. If your next attack is critical, deal +200% more damage and spawn more coins.

/*SoulReap.name: Soul Reap
/*SoulReap.desc_key: This turn, whenever you kill something, gain 4 mana
/*SoulReap.description: This turn, whenever you kill something, gain 4 mana

SoulReap2.description: Deal 1 damage to any unit. If this kills it, gain 5 mana.

SoulReap.name: Soul Reap
SoulReap.description: Deal 1 damage to a unit within five tiles. If this kills it, gain 5 mana.

/*Hunt.name: Hunt
/*Hunt.desc_key: This turn, whenever you kill something, it becomes meat and you regain health
/*Hunt.description: This turn, whenever you kill something, it becomes meat and you regain health

Hunt2.description: A stronger ranged attack that turns anything it kills into meat.

Hunt.name: Hunt
Hunt.description: A ranged attack that turns anything it kills into meat.

Flex.name: Flex
Flex.description: Gain +1 temporary Brace until your next turn and deal 1 knockback to each adjacent unit.

Flex2.description:
Gain +1 temporary Brace until your next turn and deal 3 knockback to each adjacent unit.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

HolyBlood.name: HolyBlood
HolyBlood.desc_key: Reduce the next damage you take, then heal all neignbors by the amount of damage you take.
HolyBlood.description: Reduce the next damage you take, then heal all neignbors by the amount of damage you take.

Dart.name: Dart
Dart.description: Throw a nail that ignores shield.

Dart2.description:
Throw a stronger nail that ignores shield.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

Smack2.description: A weak melee attack with a chance to repeat.

Spit.name: Spit
Spit.description: Spit attack with infinite range that deals 1 damage.

Spit2.description: Spit attack with infinite range that deals 2 damage in an area.

MiniHook2.description: Pull a unit towards you. Deal 1 damage and inflict 1 Bleed on them.

MiniDistract.name: Over There!
MiniDistract.description: Adjacent units turn away from you.

MiniDistract2.description: Units within three tiles of you turn away from you.

ButtScoot.name: Butt Scoot
ButtScoot.description: Move 1 tile, leaving a maggot familiar behind you.

ButtScoot2.description: Move up to 3 tiles, leaving a maggot familiar behind you.

Confusion2.description: Inflict Confusion 4 on units in an area.

PlayDead.name: Play Dead
PlayDead.description: Down yourself. You don't get injured.

PlayDead2.description: Down yourself. You don't get injured. Revive at the end of the next round at full HP.

Reflect.name: Reflect
Reflect.description: Reflect the next projectile that hits you back at the attacker.

Reflect2.description: You or another unit reflects the next projectile that hits them back at the attacker.

HealBolt.name: Healing Bolt
HealBolt.description: A lightning bolt that heals and has a chance to Stun.

HealBolt2.name: Healing Bolt
HealBolt2.description: A lightning bolt that heals allies and has a chance to Stun enemies.

SlipThrough.name: Slip Through
SlipThrough.description: Roll up to two tiles in a diagonal line.

SlipThrough2.description: Roll any number of tiles in a diagonal line.

Dump.name: Dump
Dump.description: Spawn a poop on an adjacent tile.

Dump2.description: Spawn a poop on an adjacent tile. Inflict Poison 3 and a 15% chance to Stun if you poop on a unit.

Snacks.name: Snacks
Snacks.description: Heal yourself or another unit within four tiles 1 HP.

Snacks2.description: Heal yourself or another unit 1 HP. 50% chance to also give +1 [img:con].

FeatherFeet2.description:
Gain +1 [img:spd].
Bonus Passive: You're unaffected by tile effects.

Reduce.name: Reduce
Reduce.description:
Gain +20% dodge chance, +4 [img:spd], and -2 Damage.
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

Reduce2.description:
Gain +20% dodge chance, +4 [img:spd], and -2 Damage.
[s:.7](This spell costs 0 mana. Castable once per battle.)[/s]

Nerf2.description: Inflict -1 Damage and -1 [img:con] on a unit.

Trip.name: Trip
Trip.description:
Immobilize an adjacent unit.
[s:.7]This only has a 25% chance to work on boss units and large enemies.[/s]

Trip2.name: Trip
Trip2.description:
Immobilize a unit in range 4.
[s:.7]This only has a 25% chance to work on boss units and large enemies.[/s]

Copycat.name: Copycat
Copycat.description: This spell is a copy of the most recent spell an allied cat cast.

Copycat2.description: This spell is an upgraded copy of the most recent spell an allied cat cast.

DollUp2.description:
Gain +1 [img:cha].
Bonus Passive: You have a chance to inflict Charm on units that contact or attack you. This chance increases with your [img:cha].

StackTheDeck2.description: Gain +1 [img:lck]. You have +99 [img:lck] during your next action.

Infiltrate.name: Tunnel
Infiltrate.description:
Dig to any open tile.
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

Infiltrate2.description:
Dig to any open tile.
[s:.7](Castable once per battle. This spell costs 0 mana.)[/s]

Burst.name: Burst
Burst.description:
Fire a magical blast.
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

Burst2.description:
Fire a magical blast.
[s:.7](This spell costs 0 mana. Castable once per battle.)[/s]

Suppress.name: Stun
Suppress.description:
Chuck a rock at a unit, inflicting Stun on that unit.
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

Suppress2.description:
Chuck a rock at a unit, inflicting Stun on that unit.
[s:.7](This spell costs 0 mana. Castable once per battle.)[/s]

Endeavor.name: Second Wind
Endeavor.description:
Refresh your basic attack, movement, weapon, and trinket action.
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

Endeavor2.description:
Refresh your basic attack, movement, weapon, and trinket action.
[s:.7](This spell costs 0 mana. Castable once per battle.)[/s]

LotteryShottery.name: Rat Roulette
LotteryShottery.description: Deal 1 damage to a random unit. If you kill that unit, take an extra turn.

LotteryShottery2.description:
Deal 2 damage to a random unit. If you kill that unit, take an extra turn.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

CatNap.name: Cat Nap
CatNap.description: Remove all of your debuffs, then fall asleep.

CatNap2.description: Remove all of your debuffs, gain All Stats Up, then fall asleep.

PissYourself.name: Number One
PissYourself.description: Spawn "water" tiles in an area around yourself.

PissYourself2.description: Spawn "water" tiles in a larger area around yourself.

FindARock2.description:
Dig up a small rock.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

Gassy_AssBlast2.description: Knock back all adjacent units 3 tiles and inflict Poison 1.

BurgeoningBlast.name: Burgeoning Blast
BurgeoningBlast.description:
A spell that deals {v0} damage. Increase this spell's damage by 2 at the end of each turn.
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

BurgeoningBlast2.description:
A spell that deals {v0} damage. Increase this spell's damage by 3 at the end of each turn.
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

BurgeoningBarrier.name: Burgeoning Barrier
BurgeoningBarrier.description:
Gain {v0} [img:shield]. Increase this spell's [img:shield] by 2 at the end of each turn.
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

BurgeoningBarrier2.description:
Gain {v0} [img:shield]. Increase this spell's [img:shield] by 3 at the end of each turn.
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

BurgeoningBattery.name: Burgeoning Battery
BurgeoningBattery.description:
Gain {v0} mana. Increase this spell's mana gain by 2 at the end of each turn.
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

BurgeoningBattery2.description:
Gain {v0} mana. Increase this spell's mana gain by 3 at the end of each turn.
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

HoseOff.name: Hose Off
HoseOff.description:
Spray a unit with water, cleansing its debuffs and making a puddle.
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

HoseOff2.description:
Spray a unit with water, cleansing its debuffs and making a puddle.
[s:.7](This spell costs 0 mana. Castable once per battle.)[/s]

Taint.name: Proliferate
Taint.description:
Double a unit's Poison, Bleed, and Burn.
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

Taint2.description:
Double a unit's Poison, Bleed, and Burn.
[s:.7](This spell costs 0 mana. Castable once per battle.)[/s]

PokeWound.name: Sudden Affliction
PokeWound.description: Trigger the Poison, Bleed, and Burn effects on a unit.

PokeWound2.description: Trigger the Poison, Bleed, and Burn effects on a unit. If that unit isn't Poisoned, Bleeding, or Burning, they gain 1 of each.

Desecrate2.description: Destroy a body and gain 2 mana.

Contort.name: Invert
Contort.description:
Swap your highest and lowest stats.
[s:.7](Ties are chosen at random)[/s]

Contort2.description:
Swap a unit's highest and lowest stats.
[s:.7](Ties are chosen at random)[/s]

RussianRoulette.name: Russian Shorthair Roulette
RussianRoulette.description: There is a 1 in 6 chance this will kill you. If it doesn't, gain +1 to a random stat and 1-2 coins.

RussianRoulette2.description: There is a 1 in 6 chance this will kill you. If it doesn't, gain +2 to a random stat and 2-4 coins.

Step.name: Step
Step.description:
Move one tile.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

Step2.description:
Move two tiles.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

Interchange.name: Interchange
Interchange.description: Exchange your movement action for an additional basic attack, and vice versa.

Interchange2.description:
Exchange your movement action for an additional basic attack, and vice versa.
[s:.7](This spell costs 0 mana the first time you cast it each turn.)[/s]

LookAtMe.name: Look at me!
LookAtMe.description: Each unit turns to face you.

LookAtMe2.description: Each unit turns to face you. 20% chance to Confuse enemies.

Rouse.name: Rouse
Rouse.description:
Give an adjacent unit +2 Charge.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

Rouse2.description:
Give any unit +2 Charge.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

Shift.name: Shift
Shift.description:
Swap positions with an adjacent unit.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

Shift2.description:
Swap positions with any unit.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

Donate.name: Make a Wish
Donate.description:
Spend a coin to spawn a random pickup on a random tile.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

Donate2.description:
Spend a coin to spawn a random pickup on an empty tile of your choice.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

Magnet.name: Magnet
Magnet.description:
Pull a pickup one tile toward you.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

Magnet2.description:
Pull a pickup all the way toward you.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn)[/s]

ScuffItOff.name: Shrug It Off
ScuffItOff.description: Heal yourself HP equal to half your [img:str], rounded up.

ScuffItOff2.description:
Heal yourself HP equal to half your [img:str], rounded up.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

BarfBall.name: Barf Ball
BarfBall.description: A ranged attack that deals damage equal to half your [img:con], rounded up.

BarfBall2.description:
A ranged attack that deals damage equal to half your [img:con], rounded up.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

DexterousHit.name: Dexterous Hit
DexterousHit.description: A melee attack that deals damage equal to half your [img:dex], rounded up.

DexterousHit2.description:
A melee attack that deals damage equal to half your [img:dex], rounded up.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

Till2.description: Tiles in an area become random tiles.

PathOfTheMage.name: Path of the Mage
PathOfTheMage.description: Transform this spell into a random Mage spell permanently.

PathOfTheMage2.description: Transform this spell into a random upgraded Mage spell permanently.

PathOfTheHunter.name: Path of the Hunter
PathOfTheHunter.description: A lobbed attack that deals 1 damage. If this kills an enemy, this spell becomes a random Hunter spell permanently.

PathOfTheHunter2.name: Path of the Hunter
PathOfTheHunter2.description: Transform this spell into a random upgraded Hunter spell permanently.

PathOfTheThief.name: Path of the Thief
PathOfTheThief.description: A straight shot attack that deals 1 damage. If this makes a critical hit, this spell becomes a random Thief spell permanently.

PathOfTheThief2.name: Path of the Thief
PathOfTheThief2.description: Transform this spell into a random upgraded Thief spell permanently.

PathOfTheFighter.name: Path of the Fighter
PathOfTheFighter.description: Your [img:int] becomes 0 until the end of the battle, then this spell becomes a random Fighter spell permanently.

PathOfTheFighter2.name: Path of the Fighter
PathOfTheFighter2.description: Transform this spell into a random upgraded Fighter spell permanently.

PathOfTheTank.name: Path of the Tank
PathOfTheTank.description: Transform this spell into a random Tank spell permanently. Castable only if you have 5 or less health.

PathOfTheTank2.description: Transform this spell into a random upgraded Tank spell permanently.

PathOfTheCleric.name: Path of the Cleric
PathOfTheCleric.description: Give an enemy All Stats Up and fully heal it, then this spell becomes a random Cleric spell permanently.

PathOfTheCleric2.name: Path of the Cleric
PathOfTheCleric2.description: Transform this spell into a random upgraded Cleric spell permanently.

PathOfTheButcher.name: Path of the Butcher
PathOfTheButcher.description: Collect an adjacent food pickup, then this spell becomes a random Butcher spell permanently.

PathOfTheButcher2.name: Path of the Butcher
PathOfTheButcher2.description: Transform this spell into a random upgraded Butcher spell permanently.

PathOfThePsychic.name: Path of the Psychic
PathOfThePsychic.description: This spell becomes a random Psychic spell permanently. Castable only if you have full mana.

PathOfThePsychic2.description: Transform this spell into a random upgraded Psychic spell permanently.

PathOfTheTinkerer.name: Path of the Tinkerer
PathOfTheTinkerer.description: Destroy your weapon, then this spell becomes a random Tinkerer spell permanently.

PathOfTheTinkerer2.name: Path of the Tinkerer
PathOfTheTinkerer2.description: Transform this spell into a random upgraded Tinkerer spell permanently.

PathOfTheMonk.name: Path of the Monk
PathOfTheMonk.description: Gain All Stats Down, then this spell becomes a random Monk spell permanently.

PathOfTheMonk2.name: Path of the Monk
PathOfTheMonk2.description: This spell becomes a random upgraded Monk spell permanently.

PathOfTheDruid.name: Path of the Druid
PathOfTheDruid.description: Plant flowers on the tile you're standing on, then this spell becomes a random Druid spell permanently. Castable only if you're standing on a grass tile.

PathOfTheDruid2.name: Path of the Druid
PathOfTheDruid2.description: Transform this spell into a random upgraded Druid spell permanently.

PathOfTheNecromancer.name: Path of the Necromancer
PathOfTheNecromancer.description: Destroy a corpse, then this spell becomes a random Necromancer spell permanently.

PathOfTheNecromancer2.name: Path of the Necromancer
PathOfTheNecromancer2.description: Transform this spell into a random Necromancer spell permanently.

Itch.name: Itch
Itch.description: Deal 1 damage to yourself. 50% chance to spawn a friendly flea.

Itch2.description: Deal 1 damage to yourself. Spawn a friendly flea.

Meow.name: Meow
Meow.description: Your closest ally moves toward you.

Meow2.name: Meow
Meow2.description: A target ally moves toward you.

Swat2.description:
Knockback a unit 10 tiles.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

LickHeal.name: Lick
LickHeal.description: Heal an adjacent unit by 2 HP.

LickHeal2.description: Heal an adjacent unit by 2 HP. Healed enemies gain Confusion 3.

Purr.name: Purr
Purr.description: Remove 1 stack of a random debuff from yourself and all adjacent units.

Purr2.description: Remove 1 stack of a random debuff from and heal 1 HP to yourself and all adjacent units.

Hiss.name: Hiss
Hiss.description: Adjacent units move away from you. You have a 25% chance to inflict Fear on them.

Hiss2.description: Adjacent units move away from you. Inflict fear on them.

Knead.name: Knead
Knead.description: Knead another unit. Allies gain +1 Damage, enemies gain Weakness 1.

Knead2.description: Knead another unit. Allies gain +2 Damage, enemies gain Weakness 2.

BuyCatnip.name: Buy Catnip
BuyCatnip.description:
Spend 5 coins, gain 10 mana.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

BuyCatnip2.description:
Spend 5 coins, gain 15 mana.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

VetVisit.name: Vet Visit
VetVisit.description:
Spend 5 coins, heal 10 HP.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

VetVisit2.description:
Spend 5 coins, heal 15 HP.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

HireHitman.name: Hire Hitman
HireHitman.description:
Spend 7 coins, summon a bounty hunter.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

HireHitman2.description:
Spend 7 coins, summon a bounty hunter with All Stats Up 2.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

SubwayRide.name: Subway Ride
SubwayRide.description:
Spend 5 coins, teleport to any tile.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

SubwayRide2.description:
Spend 2 coins, teleport to any tile.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

GymMembership.name: Gym Membership
GymMembership.description:
Spend 5 coins, gain All Stats Up.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

GymMembership2.description:
Spend 5 coins, gain All Stats Up and refresh your basic attack and movement actions.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

SuperCrateBox.name: Super Crate Box
SuperCrateBox.description: Spawn a crate on an adjacent tile.

BBQ2.description: Spawn a big cooked meat pickup.

CPR.name: CPR
CPR.description: Revive an adjacent body to 1 HP.

CPR2.description:
Revive an adjacent body to 5 HP.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

Blow.name: Blow
Blow.description: Blow units in a cone back 1 tile.

Blow2.description: Blow units in a larger cone back 1 tile.

Toast.name: Toast
Toast.description: Inflict Burn 1 on an adjacent unit.

Toast2.description: Inflict Burn 1 on a unit in range 5.

Landscape.name: Landscape
Landscape.description: Turn an adjacent tile into a small grass tile.

Landscape2.description: Turn any tile into a small grass tile.

Zap.name: Zap
Zap.description: Deal 1 electric damage at infinite range.

Zap2.description: Deal 1 electric damage with a 25% chance to Stun at infinite range.

Sunburn.name: Sunburn
Sunburn.description: Inflicts Burn 1 and Blind 1 at infinite range.

Sunburn2.description: Inflict Burn 1 and Blind 1 in an area at infinite range.

ColdShoulder.name: Cold Shoulder
ColdShoulder.description: Deal 1 ice damage and inflict Slow 1 at infinite range.

ColdShoulder2.description:
Deal 1 ice damage and inflict Slow 1 at infinite range.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

BlowKiss.name: Blow Kiss
BlowKiss.description: Heal another unit by 1 HP at infinite range.

BlowKiss2.description: Heal another unit by 2 HP at infinite range.

ForbiddenFart.name: Forbidden Fart
ForbiddenFart.description:
Damage, Inflict Poison 4 and Knock Up nearby units.
There will be permanent consequences for casting this spell…
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

ForbiddenFart2.description:
Damage, Inflict Poison 6 and Knock Up nearby units in a larger area.
There will be permanent consequences for casting this spell…
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

WetHairball.name: Wet Hairball
WetHairball.description: Shoot a wet hairball that deals damage in an area.

WetHairball2.description: Shoot a wet hairball that deals more damage in an area.

PathOfTheVoid.name: Path Of The Void
PathOfTheVoid.description: Conjure a random Collarless spell into your bonus spell slot.

PathOfTheVoid2.description: Conjure a random upgraded Collarless spell into your bonus spell slot.

PathOfTheJester.name: Path of the Jester
PathOfTheJester.description: Gain 10 random stat ups and 5 random stat downs, then transform this spell into a random class spell permanently.

PathOfTheJester2.name: Path of the Jester
PathOfTheJester2.description: Gain 10 random stat ups, then transform this spell into a random upgraded class spell permanently.
